message:
feat(ftui-core): add Cx capability context for cancellation and deadline propagation (bd-ehk.1)

Introduce the `Cx` module in ftui-core providing a lightweight capability
context handle threaded through async operations, I/O calls, and timers.

Key features:
- Cooperative cancellation via Arc-shared AtomicBool with parent chain walk
- Deadline propagation with child contexts inheriting tighter deadlines
- LabClock for deterministic testing (manually-advanceable time source)
- CxError for early bail-out at yield points via cx.check()
- Tracing integration (WARN on cancellation) and cx_cancellations_total metric
- Re-exported through ftui facade and prelude

22 unit tests covering cancellation propagation, deadline arithmetic,
lab clock determinism, parent-child chains, and metrics counters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
